underlying_goal: Refactor a playlist-based watch system to a channel-based watch system, including data model changes, UI renaming, and iterative refinement of the subfolder approach
friction_detail: Claude ran tests without uv as the user expected, and the subfolder field design needed to be revised per user's follow-up request.
brief_summary: User asked to refactor playlist watches to channel watches; initial implementation was done and pushed, but user then requested removing the subfolder field in favor of using the watch name, which was interrupted mid-execution.
